root_cause: Trace ingestion status inference used substring matching against long prose decision fields; prose containing words like failure was misclassified as ERROR.
changes: Patched observability_boot_ingest_v1.py infer_status to use exact/prefix status parsing instead of substring matching.
Added Stage 5 regression fixtures for CE, SEE, DENY, FAIL, and issues/WARN behavior.
Added executable Stage 5 classifier repair validator.
Reran trace ingestion, causal tracker build, failure cluster router, and Stage 5 validator.
Patched Stage 4 validator compatibility so Stage 5 validated repair supersedes the old derived-packet cluster expectation.
